package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for table_driven_tests_mix_multiple_domains_in_one_cases_slice: Oversized case tables that mix unrelated behaviors into one monolithic test.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule196NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule196NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule196NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario196Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule196NegativeService, input Rule196NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
